title: Missing network connectivity in containers
body:
### Issue Description

In each podman container I have created, I lost network connectivity. I experienced this issue first with distrobox, but soon I realised that this happens to all containers. My OS is Arch Linux.

```bash
% podman version
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      5.6.2
API Version:  5.6.2
Go Version:   go1.25.1 X:nodwarf5
Git Commit:   9dd5e1ed33830612bc200d7a13db00af6ab865a4
Built:        Thu Oct  2 11:47:03 2025
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

```bash
podman run --rm -it alpine sh -c "
    apk update && \
    apk add --no-cache iputils curl && \
    ping -c 2 8.8.8.8 && \
    curl -s https://ifconfig.me"
```


### Describe the results you received

```bash
fetch https://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/v3.22/main/x86_64/APKINDEX.tar.gz
WARNING: updating and opening https://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/v3.22/main: temporary error (try again later)
fetch https://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/v3.22/community/x86_64/APKINDEX.tar.gz
WARNING: updating and opening https://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/v3.22/community: temporary error (try again later)
4 unavailable, 0 stale; 16 distinct packages available
```

### Describe the results you expected

I expect regular internet connection. 

### podman info output

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Tentative solution
I tried to follow the troubleshooting guide, by setting
```bash
# sysctl -w "net.ipv4.ping_group_range=0 2000000"
```
and by making it persistent (always following the troubleshooting guide), but it is still not working.

comments.body:
I can**not** reproduce this on Fedora 42.

@marco-palmiotto did you try the Arch Linux forum?

> I can**not** reproduce this on Fedora 42.
> 
> [@marco-palmiotto](https://github.com/marco-palmiotto) did you try the Arch Linux forum?

Thank you for the quick reply. No, I haven't tried yet: I will post there now.

EDIT: I posted here because I also tried to do a fresh install of podman multiple times, but the issue persists. If there are no valuable suggestions, I am already considering a new Arch installation to start from scratch.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I will close the issue: evenutally I re-installed the OS
